ques: Plan a journey from San Francisco International Airport to Union Square via driving.
answer: Driving route planned from San Francisco International Airport (SFO) to Union Square, San Francisco — fastest route is ~36 min and 14.8 miles via US-101 N (alternatives: 37 min via US-101 N & I-280 N, 38 min via US-101 N, I-280 N & 7th St).
